title: Dennis Painting (1.21.6)
description: Backports the Dennis (Good Boy) painting to 1.21.6!
body:
Missing out on the full Chase The Skies experience? Patch up your patch with this **Bedrock-exclusive** (since changed) painting! Backports the **Dennis (Good Boy)** painting by Sarah Boeving to 1.21.6.

This pack is designed to be *very lightweight*, and uses the same internal name for the painting as in 1.21.7. In short, **these paintings will seamlessly update to the vanilla version as soon as it is released!** ### Both the data pack AND the resource pack must be loaded!

## ### MintRefresh:
